name: Festive Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and shredded cheddar cheese together with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Gradually blend in the grated American cheese until well combined.
3. Mix in the toasted sesame seeds and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Shape the mixture into a ball and chill for several hours to firm up.
5. Just before serving, roll the chilled ball in toasted nuts (such as pecans or slivered almonds) and chopped celery stalks.
6. Serve with crackers or alongside other appetizers.
